leadText: The Old Letter (Japanese: ふるびたてがみ Old Letter) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Delivering the letter to a man named Frank in Ballonlea earns the player a Choice Scarf . After the letter has been delivered, the player can return to where they received it to find a Reaper Cloth .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A letter entrusted to you by a girl, to be delivered to a boy. Strangely, it looks old to you.

sections.title: In the core series games

After the letter has been delivered, the player can return to where they received it to find a Reaper Cloth . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A letter entrusted to you by a girl, to be delivered to a boy. Strangely, it looks old to you. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Hammerlocke (from a girl named Paula above the train station)
